jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Snapdeal - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!
